scripts.build:js: concat -o assets/js/dist/xalise.bundle.js assets/js/XalConstants.js assets/js/BsBreakpoints.js assets/js/XalLoaderNav.js assets/js/XalLoaderPlaceholder.js assets/js/XalLoaderToast.js assets/js/XalHttp.js assets/js/XalTooltips.js assets/js/XalSidebar.js assets/js/XalNotifications.js assets/js/xalise.js
scripts.watch:js: npm run build:js && chokidar "assets/js/*.js" --ignore "assets/js/dist/**" -c "npm run build:js"
